title: Image Management
description: Membuat, mengelola, dan mendistribusikan Docker image.

commands.name: docker build
commands.title: Membangun Image dari Dockerfile
commands.description: Membuat image baru berdasarkan instruksi di Dockerfile.

options.description: Beri nama dan tag pada image

commands.examples:
docker build -t myapp .
docker build -t myapp:1.0 .
docker build -f Dockerfile.prod -t myapp:prod .
docker build --no-cache -t myapp .
docker build --build-arg NODE_ENV=production -t myapp .

# Multi-platform
docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t myapp .
commands.notes: Titik (.) di akhir adalah build context — Docker menggunakan file dari sana.

commands.name: docker images
commands.title: Melihat Daftar Image
commands.description: Menampilkan semua image yang ada di local.
commands.examples:
docker images
docker images -q
docker images --filter dangling=true
docker images node
commands.notes: Dangling images = image tanpa tag, biasanya sisa build lama.

commands.name: docker pull / push
commands.title: Pull dan Push Image
commands.description: Mengunduh image dari registry atau mengunggah ke registry.
commands.examples:
docker pull nginx
docker pull node:20-alpine
docker pull postgres:16

# Push ke Docker Hub
docker tag myapp username/myapp:latest
docker push username/myapp:latest

# Push ke registry lain
docker tag myapp ghcr.io/user/myapp:1.0
docker push ghcr.io/user/myapp:1.0
commands.notes: Harus docker login terlebih dahulu sebelum push.

commands.name: docker rmi / prune
commands.title: Menghapus Image
commands.description: Menghapus satu atau lebih image dari local storage.
commands.examples:
docker rmi nginx
docker rmi myapp:1.0
docker image prune
docker image prune -a

# Hapus semua image
docker rmi $(docker images -q)
commands.warning: docker image prune -a menghapus SEMUA image yang tidak dipakai container!

commands.name: Dockerfile
commands.title: Instruksi Dockerfile
commands.description: Instruksi-instruksi utama dalam Dockerfile untuk membangun image.
commands.syntax:
FROM image
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN command
EXPOSE port
CMD ["command"]

options.description: Salin file dari host ke image
COPY + bisa extract tar dan download URL
Set user untuk RUN, CMD, ENTRYPOINT

commands.examples:
# Node.js app
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
EXPOSE 3000
USER node
CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]
commands.notes: Multi-stage build mengurangi ukuran image final secara signifikan.
